items.title: Project takeover shows four workspace tabs (FILES · REPO · PRS · TERMINAL)
items.precondition: At least one project exists; open it via the folder icon in the session sidebar.
steps: 3. Observe the tab strip below the project header.
items.expected: Four tabs render; FILES is active by default.
items.notes: tsc + frontend build pass; visual check needs the running app.

items.title: FILES tab behaves exactly as before
steps: 2. Open a file, edit it, Cmd/Ctrl+S to save.
3. Switch to REPO and back to FILES.
items.expected: Tree, open tabs, dirty markers, save, and editor state all work; switching tabs does not reset open editors.

items.title: PRS tab lists the open project's pull requests and connect/settings works
items.precondition: Azure connection configured for the project (or ready to configure).
steps: 2. Observe the Azure connection panel and PR list.
3. If disconnected, enter a PAT and reconnect.
items.expected: PRs for the open project load; the 401→settings reconnect flow works; no project selector is shown.

items.title: Cockpit is gone from the sidebar; no dead imports
steps: 2. Confirm there is no Cockpit entry (Sessions · Agents · Projects only).
items.expected: No Cockpit tab; CockpitPanel.tsx and GitPanel.tsx are deleted.
items.evidence: App.tsx SECTIONS no longer contains cockpit; CockpitPanel.tsx and GitPanel.tsx removed; frontend build clean (no dead imports).

items.title: Build + typecheck pass
items.evidence: tsc EXIT=0; Vite build succeeded (chunk-size warning is pre-existing Monaco bulk).
